artifacts.name: architecture-overview
artifacts.description: Full agent guidance: Code Exploration Policy (SocratiCode deferred tools, prefetch query, negative rule), architecture overview, middleware stack, service topology, router/service breakdown, sensitive areas, deployment, auth, env vars, and commit conventions.

artifacts.name: usps-api-spec
artifacts.description: USPS Address Validation API v3 OpenAPI spec — upstream provider contract, request/response shapes, DPV fields.

artifacts.name: usps-pub28-reference
artifacts.description: USPS Publication 28 standardization rules — suffix/directional/unit abbreviation conventions used by the standardizer.

artifacts.name: validation-providers
artifacts.description: DPV code mapping and behavioral details for USPS and Google validation providers; quota, rate-limit, and fallback semantics.

artifacts.name: address-validation-research
artifacts.description: Domain research: address standards (USPS Pub 28, ISO 19160-4, Canada Post), provider landscape, parsing libraries, and design tradeoffs.

artifacts.name: logging-contract
artifacts.description: Logging event/level table: what is logged at each level, PII policy (no address content at INFO+), structured fields.

artifacts.name: admin-style-guide
artifacts.description: Admin UI visual design, accessibility, responsive layout, and performance standards for Jinja2/HTMX/Tailwind templates.

artifacts.name: dependency-policy
artifacts.description: Dependency version pinning rules and upgrade policy.

artifacts.name: design-plans
artifacts.description: Feature and architectural design docs: rationale, tradeoffs, and decisions behind every major subsystem — quota guards, middleware refactors, CA address support, admin dashboard, training pipeline, and more.
